name: Air6Pix

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: FAA4304B-D00F-455A-BBAD-10BEA3157B3B

comment: AIR6PIX is a moving batten designed to deliver a powerful blade of beams. Each of the 4,5° RGBW LED pixels are individually controllable and both sides pivot to create classic ACL 'fan' and 'knot' looks. With infinite rotation of both pan and tilt, the only limit is the designer's imagination.

gwSpecs.description: AIR6PIX is a moving batten designed to deliver a powerful blade of beams. Each of the 4,5° RGBW LED pixels are individually controllable and both sides pivot to create classic ACL 'fan' and 'knot' looks. With infinite rotation of both pan and tilt, the only limit is the designer's imagination.
